title: 工具执行成功: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_items.py (第 1 至 260 行，共 297 行) ---
   1 | """统一长期记忆数据模型。
   2 | 
   3 | 阶段 2 引入的模型用于把“原始事件”和“长期知识条目”从旧的
   4 | SessionSummary 中拆出来：
   5 | - RawObservation：记录未加工的原始事件来源；
   6 | - MemoryItem：记录可长期复用的知识型记忆；
   7 | - MemoryRecallResult：记录召回结果、分数和来源说明。
   8 | """
   9 | 
  10 | from __future__ import annotations
  11 | 
  12 | import json
  13 | import uuid
  14 | from dataclasses import dataclass, field
  15 | from datetime import datetime
  16 | from enum import Enum
  17 | from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional
  18 | 
  19 | 
  20 | def _now_iso() -> str:
  21 |     return datetime.now().isoformat()
  22 | 
  23 | 
  24 | def _new_id(prefix: str) -> str:
  25 |     return f"{prefix}_{uuid.uuid4().hex}"
  26 | 
  27 | 
  28 | def _as_list(value: Any) -> List[Any]:
  29 |     if value is None:
  30 |         return []
  31 |     if isinstance(value, list):
  32 |         return value
  33 |     if isinstance(value, tuple):
  34 |         return list(value)
  35 |     return [value]
  36 | 
  37 | 
  38 | class ObservationType(str, Enum):
  39 |     """原始观察事件类型。"""
  40 | 
  41 |     PROMPT_SUBMIT = "prompt_submit"
  42 |     ASSISTANT_MESSAGE = "assistant_message"
  43 |     PRE_TOOL_USE = "pre_tool_use"
  44 |     POST_TOOL_USE = "post_tool_use"
  45 |     TOOL_FAILURE = "tool_failure"
  46 |     SESSION_START = "session_start"
  47 |     SESSION_END = "session_end"
  48 |     TEST_RESULT = "test_result"
  49 |     FILE_CHANGE = "file_change"
  50 |     OTHER = "other"
  51 | 
  52 | 
  53 | class MemoryKind(str, Enum):
  54 |     """长期记忆条目类型。"""
  55 | 
  56 |     FACT = "fact"
  57 |     ARCHITECTURE = "architecture"
  58 |     PREFERENCE = "preference"
  59 |     BUG = "bug"
  60 |     WORKFLOW = "workflow"
  61 |     DECISION = "decision"
  62 |     PROCEDURAL = "procedural"
  63 |     TASK = "task"
  64 |     SUMMARY = "summary"
  65 |     OTHER = "other"
  66 | 
  67 | 
  68 | class MemoryStatus(str, Enum):
  69 |     """MemoryItem 生命周期状态。"""
  70 | 
  71 |     ACTIVE = "active"
  72 |     SUPERSEDED = "superseded"
  73 |     ARCHIVED = "archived"
  74 | 
  75 | 
  76 | @dataclass
  77 | class RawObservation:
  78 |     """原始事件记录。
  79 | 
  80 |     RawObservation 不直接承担“知识”的语义，它保留事件的原貌，方便后续
  81 |     追溯 MemoryItem 来源、排查错误或重新提炼记忆。
  82 |     """
  83 | 
  84 |     id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: _new_id("obs"))
  85 |     session_id: str = ""
  86 |     project: str = ""
  87 |     cwd: str = ""
  88 |     timestamp: str = field(default_factory=_now_iso)
  89 |     event_type: str = ObservationType.OTHER.value
  90 |     tool_name: Optional[str] = None
  91 |     tool_input: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
  92 |     tool_output: Optional[str] = None
  93 |     user_prompt: Optional[str] = None
  94 |     assistant_message: Optional[str] = None
  95 |     error: Optional[str] = None
  96 |     files: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  97 |     metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
  98 | 
  99 |     def __post_init__(self) -> None:
 100 |         self.event_type = _normalize_enum_value(self.event_type, ObservationType, ObservationType.OTHER.value)
 101 |         self.files = [str(item) for item in _as_list(self.files)]
 102 |         self.metadata = dict(self.metadata or {})
 103 |         if self.tool_input is not None:
 104 |             self.tool_input = dict(self.tool_input)
 105 | 
 106 |     def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 107 |         return {
 108 |             "id": self.id,
 109 |             "session_id": self.session_id,
 110 |             "project": self.project,
 111 |             "cwd": self.cwd,
 112 |             "timestamp": self.timestamp,
 113 |             "event_type": self.event_type,
 114 |             "tool_name": self.tool_name,
 115 |             "tool_input": self.tool_input,
 116 |             "tool_output": self.tool_output,
 117 |             "user_prompt": self.user_prompt,
 118 |             "assistant_message": self.assistan...

raw_observation.tool_output:
